description.value:
Benefit: Whenever you see yourself in a reflective surface, you are fascinated by it for 1d4 rounds. Additionally, if you take a full HD's worth of damage in one attack, you become shaken until you spend a standard action to check yourself over. Failure to do so will leave you shaken until you do.

Gain: Taking this flaw grants you one bonus feat.
